title: danthonia villosa
intro: Danthonia villosa, also known as hair grass or villous danthonia, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Danthonia villosa include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and acting as a natural antiseptic to promote wound healing. Danthonia villosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
